title: codonacanthus pauciflorus
intro: Codonacanthus pauciflorus, commonly known as Thai borage or Thai ginger, is a plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine, particularly in Thailand, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Codonacanthus pauciflorus include relief from arthritis, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, and it can also be consumed as a food ingredient in various Thai dishes.
